title: Wire 3-worker QA family into automation loop (controlled cadence; NO daemon)
self_approve_authority: AMD_LANE01_CTO_AUTO_APPROVE_TECH_NON_CANON §3.1 YES list (Python coordinator + JSON Schema + workflow YAML + pytest tests are tech non-canon; READS 3 worker reports but does NOT edit workers)
wraps_under: LANE01-W3-FIRE-3-LANES-V1 (Phase C — full task lifecycle as Lane_01 task)

phases.name: Aggregate report schema
actions: Required: qa_loop_id (pattern AIER-QA-LOOP-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN), scan_started_at + scan_finished_at, repo_head_sha, three sub-reports (scan / canon / skill), aggregate_health_score 0..100, recommended_actions

phases.name: Coordinator script
actions: Invoke 3 workers as subprocesses (--scan-only --report-out <path>) + load each report + aggregate
scan_health_score derived from findings (no scan_health_score field in scan_report); compute via 100 - critical*10 - warning*3 - info*1

phases.name: Workflow
actions: Steps: checkout → pip install jsonschema → self-test → run loop → upload artifact → conditional auto-commit unified report
Race-safe pull-rebase pattern from W2.T2 onwards

phases.name: Tests
actions: Targets: aggregate health score formula + sub-report parse fixtures + schema validation + self-test mode + audit event 9-field + dispatch behavior + missing sub-report graceful + duration aggregation

phases.name: Real loop run
actions: Run python scripts/workers/aier_qa_loop.py against actual repo

boundary_check.weighted_avg_score_formula: scan_health*0.30 + canon_health*0.40 + skill_health*0.30 (canon highest weight = canon drift is most consequential)
